name: Local L2R ICMP Scanner
notes: Reports a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common ICMP ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following Recon: Local  LDAP Server Scanner, Recon: Local Database Scanner, Recon: Local DHCP Scanner, Recon: Local DNS Scanner, Recon: Local FTP Scanner, Recon: Local Game Server Scanner, Recon: Local IM Server Scanner, Recon: Local IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Local Mail Server Scanner, Recon: Local P2P Server Scanner, Recon: Local Proxy Server Scanner, Recon: Local RPC Server Scanner, Recon: Local SNMP Scanner, Recon: Local SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Local Web Server Scanner, Recon: Local Windows Server Scanner
when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP.icmp_ip
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Local L2R ICMP Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Recon: Local  LDAP Server Scanner, Recon: Local Database Scanner, Recon: Local DHCP Scanner, Recon: Local DNS Scanner, Recon: Local FTP Scanner, Recon: Local Game Server Scanner, Recon: Local IM Server Scanner, Recon: Local IRC Server Scanner, Recon: Local Mail Server Scanner, Recon: Local P2P Server Scanner, Recon: Local Proxy Server Scanner, Recon: Local RPC Server Scanner, Recon: Local SNMP Scanner, Recon: Local SSH Server Scanner, Recon: Local Web Server Scanner, Recon: Local Windows Server Scanner
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following ICMP.icmp_ip
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
RED_list: Event description: Detected  a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common ICMP ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 0 second(s)
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
